creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
Please close the PR, mounting fdescfs is mandatory for spamd.

I don't know why the issue is assigned to freebsd-ports-bugs@FreeBSD.org
instead to me (maintainer), even halve of the conversation is missing on
the web-frontend (maybe there was an issue at with the bugtracking tool).

I found the request only by reading the issues on news://news.gemane.org.


For full conversation see:
==========================
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports-bugs/2010-March/183987.html

olli hauer
